trustBar.corridors: AFRICA → EU · UK · USA · CANADA · TÜRKIYE · SWITZERLAND

factsSection.heading: What every African commodity importer should know
factsSection.subheading: 191 commodities. 54 African origins. 7 destinations. Every regulation mapped.

regulations.heading: Upcoming regulatory deadlines
regulations.eudr: EUDR: Entry into application 30 Dec 2025 for large/medium operators; 30 Jun 2026 for micro/small enterprises. Covers cocoa, coffee, palm oil, rubber, soy, wood, cattle — and derived products.
regulations.cbam: CBAM: Fully operational from 1 Jan 2026. Importers above the threshold must purchase CBAM certificates reflecting embedded carbon. Affects aluminium, iron, steel, cement, fertilisers, hydrogen.
regulations.ukBtom: UK Border: Full SPS checks on all food/plant imports. Phytosanitary certificates mandatory — missing one means automatic rejection at the border.

costs.heading: Cost of compliance failures
costs.demurrage: $75–$300/day demurrage at Felixstowe, Rotterdam, Hamburg while documents are stuck
costs.bankFee: $95–$160 bank fee for a single LC discrepancy
costs.isfPenalty: $5,000 US ISF late-filing penalty per violation
costs.cascadeCost: A single missing Certificate of Origin from Ghana, Côte d'Ivoire, or Kenya can cascade into $1,500+ in delays and fees

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subheading: From corridor check to customs clearance in four steps.

step1.label: KNOW
step1.title: Map your corridor
step1.description: Enter your commodity, origin, and destination. TapTrao maps every required document, duty rate, and regulatory trigger — EUDR, CBAM, SPS, CITES, and more.

step2.label: ASK
step2.title: Collect from suppliers
step2.description: Generate a zero-login upload link for your supplier. They see exactly which documents to provide and upload directly from their phone. No account needed.

step3.label: PROVE
step3.title: Cross-validate everything
step3.description: Upload your LC and trade documents. TapTrao cross-checks every field against UCP 600 rules and flags discrepancies before you submit to the bank.

step4.label: MONITOR
step4.title: Watch for changes
step4.description: Set up corridor alerts. Get notified when duty rates change, new regulations apply, or deadlines approach — before they impact your shipment.

demo.heading: See the full shipment journey
demo.subheading: From compliance check to customs clearance. Track every document, every risk, every step.
